items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide, oil jumps on renewed U.S.-Iran war risks
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana prices reflects broader market volatility, which could impact SOL's liquidity and investor confidence.

items.title: Solana Dominates Q1, But Cracks Appear as Ethereum Gains Ground
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's strong performance in Q1 is now challenged by Ethereum's resurgence, indicating potential shifts in ecosystem usage and competitive positioning.

items.title: Weekly ETF recap: How Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana & XRP funds stacked up?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Analyzing ETF flows for Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP provides insights into institutional interest, which is crucial for SOL's market dynamics and liquidity.
